subject: Payment failed
body: I cannot complete my payment. I've tried multiple times but keep getting an error at checkout.

subject: Server downtime alert
body: Production server us-east-1 is experiencing critical downtime. All services affected.

subject: Terrible service!
body: I've been waiting 3 days for a response. This is unacceptable customer service.

subject: Cannot login to my account
body: I reset my password but still cannot access my account. Please help urgently.

subject: How to export data?
body: Hi, could you guide me on how to export my data from the platform to CSV?

subject: Weekly Tech Roundup - June 2026
body: Here are the top tech stories this week: AI breakthroughs, new frameworks, and more.

subject: YOU WON $1,000,000!!!
body: Click here to claim your prize now! Limited time offer. Act fast!

subject: Invoice payment overdue
body: Your invoice #4521 is 15 days overdue. Please process payment immediately to avoid service interruption.

subject: Refund request for recent purchase
body: I would like to request a refund for my recent purchase due to unexpected charges.

subject: Meeting reminder
body: This is a reminder about our scheduled partnership discussion tomorrow at 10 AM.

subject: Congratulations! You've won $10,000
body: Click the link below immediately to claim your prize before it expires.

subject: URGENT: Production system outage
body: Our customers are unable to place orders due to a production outage. This is impacting revenue and requires immediate attention.

subject: Critical API outage affecting integrations
body: Our production systems can no longer communicate with your API. Multiple business processes are blocked and require immediate resolution.

subject: Account locked before important deadline
body: My account has been locked and I need access immediately to complete a client deliverable due today.

subject: Security incident detected
body: Multiple unauthorized login attempts have been detected on administrative accounts. Please review immediately.

subject: Formal complaint regarding service disruption
body: Our team has been unable to use your platform for the past two days. We require urgent assistance and a resolution timeline.

subject: Critical API outage affecting integrations
body: Our production systems can no longer communicate with your API. Multiple business processes are blocked and require immediate resolution.

subject: Suspicious activity detected on customer accounts
body: We have identified unusual activity affecting several customer accounts. Please investigate immediately and provide an update.

subject: Unable to access production environment
body: Our entire operations team has lost access to the production environment. This issue is disrupting critical business activities.
